title: Squire Heavy Duty Padlock (CP50BLACK) - Toughest Steel Shackle - 4 Wheel 50mm Wide Combination Padlock (Black) - Alloy Steel for Corrosion Resistance - Weatherproof Lock for Home, School & Garage
features: HIGH KEYLESS SECURITY WITH SQUIRE’S COMBINATION PADLOCK: Safeguard your belongings with a simple 4 digit code and the click of the button of our combination padlock. The lock saves you the hassle of managing a bunch of keys and replacing them when lost. Squire’s padlocks also come with a 10 year warranty and police accreditations to ensure your safety is in good hands.

10,000 COMBINATIONS CODES FOR UNBEATABLE PROTECTION: The 4 wheel combination padlock allows you to code and re-code the lock as you see fit. With its patented re-codable mechanism, you can pick your preferred code from 10,000 different combinations and easily reset the code within minutes. Unlike typical 3 digit locks, our 4 wheel padlock offers higher security.

WEATHERPROOF & STURDY BODY FOR LONG-LASTING USE: Made using alloy steel with zinc diecast finish to provide ever-lasting protection, the combination padlock is reliable and anti-corrosive. Its dual compound body cover makes it remarkably comfortable to handle the lock. Over 180 hours in a salt spray test has been conducted to prove its resistance against harsh conditions.

ROBUST LOCK WITH A STRONG STEEL SHACKLE: The powerful steel shackle can be used for securing the lock even in the tightest of spots. Its heavy-duty design is highly durable and provides extra resistance to cutting. The robust steel makes it difficult for the lock to be broken by brute force attacks, securing your belongings from thefts.

VERSATILE PADLOCK FOR MULTI-PURPOSE USE: From securing your homes to locking up your sheds and garages, this tough combination padlock serves all purposes. Its compact and portable body measures 50 x 26 x 95 millimetres. The waterproof and weather-resistance lock can be used for both indoor and outdoor purposes. Its convenient push button and code mechanism also makes it ideal for gates, wardrobes, garages, and gym lockers.
